content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Buy a Shovel". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/732/A
content.inputFormat: Two integers, k and n, on the same line, separated by space
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of shovels to buy

solution.approach: Divide the total cost by the cost per shovel and round up to the nearest whole number

code.Python3:
import math
k, n = map(int, input().split())
print(math.ceil(n / k))
